_comment: PROPOSED replacement for .claude/settings.json — staged 2026-07-11 because the auto-mode classifier blocks agent edits to the live settings file. Review, then apply with: cp .claude/settings.proposed.json .claude/settings.json && rm .claude/settings.proposed.json. Changes vs current: (1) disableRemoteControl: true — stops the remote-control poller that keeps finished hourly scheduled-task processes alive (~165MB each, the suspected memory leak); (2) six new narrow allow entries the loop actually uses (mkdir /tmp, npm view/ls, git pull --ff-only, source .env, wait, scheduled-tasks list); (3) hooks wiring for the vibewatch-style security pattern checks in .claude/hooks/.
